workflows.entry: repository identity or state is unknown
workflows.exit: verified root and first safe mutation

workflows.entry: cleanup or stale Git/PR state is selected
workflows.exit: useful work preserved and bounded cleanup proven
tracked change, validators, commit, push or PR evidence

workflows.entry: an existing PR is broken or conflicting
workflows.exit: repair evidence and mergeable PR state

workflows.entry: all merge or release gates pass
workflows.exit: merge, tag, release, or deployment evidence
artifact, manifest/registry evidence, validators, path/hash and proof ceiling

workflows.entry: a local website snapshot, workbook, or workbook bundle must be analyzed or converted
workflows.first_action: run the registered input analyzer and emit conversion_analysis.json
workflows.exit: analysis artifact for planning, or an actual direction-specific artifact with shared-IR hash, validators, source fingerprint, proof ceiling, and field gates

workflows.entry: repo-local harness surfaces are missing or incomplete
workflows.exit: discoverable manifest, enforcement, commit and PR evidence
